styles.container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 20px 48px 20px; font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.8 !color: #3d2c1e !background-color: #fdf6ee !word-wrap: break-word;
styles.a: color: #c0582a !text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(192,88,42,0.3); padding-bottom: 1px;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px 20px; background-color: #f8ead6 !border-left: 4px solid #e8a65d; color: #5a4232 !border-radius: 4px; font-style: italic;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 6px; background-color: #f5e6d0 !color: #c0582a !border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: #f5e6d0 !border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 12px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.hr: margin: 36px auto; border: none; height: 1px; background-color: #e8d4b8 !width: 100%;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 4px;
styles.th: background-color: #f5e6d0 !padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; color: #3d2c1e !border: 1px solid #e8d4b8;

themes.name: Monokai
themes.description: 经典代码编辑器配色，程序员的终极浪漫

styles.container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 20px 48px 20px; font-family: "SF Mono", "Fira Code", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7 !color: #f8f8f2 !background-color: #272822 !word-wrap: break-word;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", "Fira Code", Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 6px; background-color: #3e3d32 !color: #a6e22e !border-radius: 4px; font-size: 13px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: #3e3d32 !border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 13px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.hr: margin: 36px auto; border: none; height: 1px; background-color: #49483e !width: 100%;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 4px;
styles.th: background-color: #3e3d32 !padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; color: #a6e22e !border: 1px solid #49483e;

themes.name: Solarized
themes.description: 经典暖色调开发者配色，柔和护眼的阅读体验

styles.container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 20px 48px 20px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.7 !color: #657b83 !background-color: #fdf6e3 !word-wrap: break-word;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 6px; background-color: #eee8d5 !color: #859900 !border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: #eee8d5 !border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 12px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.hr: margin: 36px auto; border: none; height: 1px; background-color: #eee8d5 !width: 100%;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 4px;
styles.th: background-color: #eee8d5 !padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; color: #657b83 !border: 1px solid #ddd6c1;

themes.name: Cyberpunk
themes.description: 霓虹闪烁的赛博朋克世界，品红与青的极致碰撞

styles.container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 20px 48px 20px; font-family: "SF Mono", "Fira Code", Consolas, monospace; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7 !color: #e0e0ff !background-color: #0d0221 !word-wrap: break-word;
styles.h1: font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #ff2a6d !text-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(255,42,109,0.5); line-height: 1.3 !margin: 38px 0 16px; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", "Fira Code", Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 6px; background-color: #1a0a3e !color: #05d9e8 !border-radius: 0; font-size: 13px !line-height: 1.5 !border: 1px solid #2a1a4e;
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: #1a0a3e !border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 13px !line-height: 1.5 !border: 1px solid #2a1a4e;
styles.hr: margin: 36px auto; border: none; height: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ff2a6d, #05d9e8) !width: 100%;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 0;
styles.th: background-color: #1a0a3e !padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; color: #ff2a6d !border: 1px solid #2a1a4e;

themes.name: 水墨
themes.description: 纯粹的黑白水墨风，零色彩干扰的极简阅读

styles.container: max-width: 100%; margin: 0 auto; padding: 24px 20px 48px 20px; font-family: Georgia, "Times New Roman", Times, serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.8 !color: #111111 !background-color: #ffffff !word-wrap: break-word;
styles.h1: font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; color: #000000 !line-height: 1.3 !margin: 38px 0 16px; letter-spacing: -0.02em; border-bottom: 2px solid #000; padding-bottom: 10px;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px 20px; background-color: transparent !border-left: 3px solid #000000; color: #333333 !border-radius: 0;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, monospace; padding: 3px 6px; background-color: #f0f0f0 !color: #000000 !border-radius: 2px; font-size: 13px !line-height: 1.5 !
styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: #f5f5f5 !border-radius: 2px; overflow-x: auto; font-size: 13px !line-height: 1.5 !border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
styles.hr: margin: 36px auto; border: none; height: 1px; background-color: #000000 !width: 40%;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 0;
styles.th: background-color: #f5f5f5 !padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; color: #000000 !border: 1px solid #cccccc;
